text:
This port is still broken... you fixed the desktop file, but not the
binary (the one used in pkg-plist is different from the one in
Makefile).

Just apply my patch to the original version, then replace pkg-message.

-- 
Zhihao Yuan, nickname lichray
The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
